title: Berlin TV Tower Facts - Quick Summary
items: **The TV Tower is 368 metres high** and is described by visitBerlin as the tallest publicly accessible building in Europe.
**It was not first planned for Alexanderplatz:** early GDR plans considered the Mueggelberge hills before the airport approach problem changed the project.
**The tower opened on 3 October 1969,** shortly before the GDR's 20th birthday.
**The sphere was designed as a space-age symbol,** with the official TV Tower history linking it to Soviet Sputnik imagery.
**Today it has changed meaning completely:** a GDR prestige symbol became one of Berlin's most successful tourist landmarks.
